    A

    addContribution(int, float) - Method in class com.fakkaflow.logic.service.GoalService
    Adds contribution to a goal.
    AlertingService - Class in com.fakkaflow.logic.service
    Service responsible for monitoring budgets and generating alerts.
    AlertingService() - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.logic.service.AlertingService
     
    AlertingService.AlertLevel - Enum Class in com.fakkaflow.logic.service
    Alert levels for budget usage.
    AlertingService.BudgetAlert - Record Class in com.fakkaflow.logic.service
    Record representing a budget alert.
    AuthService - Class in com.fakkaflow.logic.service
    Service responsible for user authentication and session handling.
    AuthService() - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.logic.service.AuthService
     

    B

    Budget - Class in com.fakkaflow.data.model
    Represents a budget for a specific category for a user.
    Budget() - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.data.model.Budget
    Default constructor.
    Budget(int, int, float, String) - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.data.model.Budget
    Creates a new budget with basic details.

    Creates an instance of a BudgetAlert record class.
    BudgetCycle - Class in com.fakkaflow.data.model
    Represents a budget cycle for a user.
    BudgetCycle() - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.data.model.BudgetCycle
    Default constructor.
    BudgetCycle(int, float, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.data.model.BudgetCycle
    Creates a new budget cycle.

    Repository class for managing Budget entities in the database.
    BudgetRepository() - Constructor for class com.fakkaflow.data.repository.BudgetRepository
     
    BudgetService - Class in com.fakkaflow.logic.service
    Service responsible for managing budgets, budget cycles, and financial calculations such as expenses and limits.

    C

    calculateMonthlySavingsNeeded(Goal) - Method in class com.fakkaflow.logic.service.GoalService
    Calculates required monthly saving.
    calculateRemainingBalance(int) - Method in class com.fakkaflow.logic.service.BudgetService
    Calculates remaining balance for current cycle.
    calculateSafeDailyLimit(int) - Method in class com.fakkaflow.logic.service.BudgetService
    Calculates safe daily spending limit based on remaining balance and days left.
    calculateUnspent(int, float) - Method in class com.fakkaflow.logic.engine.RolloverEngine
    Calculates the unspent amount from a user's total allowance.

    Returns the value of the category record component.

    Represents a transaction category.

    Checks if a budget crosses warning thresholds.

    Checks all budgets and generates alerts.
